name: Satin Fudge Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chocolate into small pieces and set aside.
2. Combine the sugar and whipping cream in a heavy, 3-quart saucepan.
3. Stir to dissolve the sugar completely. Bring mixture to a boil.
4. Cook for 6 minutes from the time it comes to a boil.
5. Remove from heat and gradually add the chocolate and butter, stirring until melted.
6. Add the vanilla extract and stir thoroughly.
7. Refrigerate until well chilled but not solid.
8. Stir vigorously with a wooden spoon until the frosting reaches a soft, spreadable consistency.
